tasks.name: Daily prospect scan — Financial Advisors
tasks.description: Scan LinkedIn, Facebook groups, and Reddit for independent financial advisors posting pain signals about client acquisition, referral pipeline, or AUM growth plateau
acceptance_criteria: All results pass pre_flight_check (DNC, consent, cooldown, fields)
No PII transmitted without SHA-256 hashing
All HubSpot/Meta/Calendly calls routed through EventDispatcher only
Status report written to orchestrator within 60 seconds of completion
scan_runs row marked complete with found/qualified/stored counts
Wire house advisors (Merrill, Morgan Stanley, UBS, Edward Jones, Raymond James) excluded from results
No prospect with icp_score < MIN_ICP_SCORE (default 4) stored as qualified

tasks.name: Calendly booking poll
tasks.description: Poll Calendly for new bookings from financial advisor prospects and update HubSpot deal stages
acceptance_criteria: New bookings matched to prospects within 15 minutes
HubSpot deal stage updated via EventDispatcher only
Pre-call brief generated for every new booking (includes advisor niche context, AUM signals, pain points from post)
No booking processed twice (event_id dedup enforced via dispatched_events table)

niche_signal_phrases: how do you grow your AUM
